---
name: docs-review
description: >
  Review documentation audit findings or content-fit questions without editing
  files.
---

# Docs Review

Use this skill to recommend documentation actions before changes are made.

## Workflow

1. Read the finding, target doc, and relevant source files.
2. Classify the recommendation:
   - keep
   - move
   - shorten to pointer
   - remove
   - update source mapping or audit config
   - create follow-up
3. Ground every recommendation in current source or clear ownership rationale.
4. Do not edit files.
